posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 16 of 16 Pending | Tied for 1st with 27 others Magomedov vs. ParkSi Won Park, TKO, R2Pumped to see Park back. He took a pretty brutal L last year in a wild firefight but bounced back nicely. I’m still worried about that loss because he gassed out and took a **** load of damage, but at the same time I think he’s really skilled. He has bad defense like all Koreans but his striking is nasty and his tdd is pretty good. Kamil is super experienced and the grappling coach at KHK Bahrain but he’s been looking pretty old as of late. His grappling is great but he’s very chinny. I think Park stops the takedowns and breaks Kanil. I hope he can get a showcase bout for RTU later this yearLee vs. ChoJung Hyun Lee, TKO, R3Wow this is a really cool fight between two of the younger prospects in Korea. I love Cho’s activity but he can’t wrestle at all and isn’t even losing to that great level of competition. He has very flashy striking though. Lee impressed me a lot before RTU but the he seemed to have regressed, only to look amazing against a very solid guy in Rizin. Should be a good fightMikami vs. ChoDaichi Mikami, SUB, R2Daichi has a bad record but none of his losses are that bad. Lee somehow made the ufc and the other two made DWCS
